CVE-2019-19905.title: NetHack 3.6.x before 3.6.4 is prone to a buffer overflow vulnerab ...
CVE-2019-19905.summary: NetHack 3.6.x before 3.6.4 is prone to a buffer overflow vulnerability when reading very long lines from configuration files. This affects systems that have NetHack installed suid/sgid, and shared systems that allow users to upload their own configuration files.

CVE-2020-5209.title: In NetHack before 3.6.5, unknown options starting with -de and -i ...
CVE-2020-5209.summary: In NetHack before 3.6.5, unknown options starting with -de and -i can cause a buffer overflow resulting in a crash or remote code execution/privilege escalation. This vulnerability affects systems that have NetHack installed suid/sgid and shared systems that allow users to influence command line options. Users should upgrade to NetHack 3.6.5.

CVE-2020-5210.title: In NetHack before 3.6.5, an invalid argument to the -w command li ...
CVE-2020-5210.summary: In NetHack before 3.6.5, an invalid argument to the -w command line option can cause a buffer overflow resulting in a crash or remote code execution/privilege escalation. This vulnerability affects systems that have NetHack installed suid/sgid and shared systems that allow users to influence command line options. Users should upgrade to NetHack 3.6.5.

CVE-2020-5211.title: In NetHack before 3.6.5, an invalid extended command in value for ...
CVE-2020-5211.summary: In NetHack before 3.6.5, an invalid extended command in value for the AUTOCOMPLETE configuration file option can cause a buffer overflow resulting in a crash or remote code execution/privilege escalation. This vulnerability affects systems that have NetHack installed suid/sgid and shared systems that allow users to upload their own configuration files. Users should upgrade to NetHack 3.6.5.

CVE-2020-5212.title: In NetHack before 3.6.5, an extremely long value for the MENUCOLO ...
CVE-2020-5212.summary: In NetHack before 3.6.5, an extremely long value for the MENUCOLOR configuration file option can cause a buffer overflow resulting in a crash or remote code execution/privilege escalation. This vulnerability affects systems that have NetHack installed suid/sgid and shared systems that allow users to upload their own configuration files. Users should upgrade to NetHack 3.6.5.

CVE-2020-5213.title: In NetHack before 3.6.5, too long of a value for the SYMBOL confi ...
CVE-2020-5213.summary: In NetHack before 3.6.5, too long of a value for the SYMBOL configuration file option can cause a buffer overflow resulting in a crash or remote code execution/privilege escalation. This vulnerability affects systems that have NetHack installed suid/sgid and shared systems that allow users to upload their own configuration files. Users should upgrade to NetHack 3.6.5.

CVE-2020-5214.title: In NetHack before 3.6.5, detecting an unknown configuration file  ...
CVE-2020-5214.summary: In NetHack before 3.6.5, detecting an unknown configuration file option can cause a buffer overflow resulting in a crash or remote code execution/privilege escalation. This vulnerability affects systems that have NetHack installed suid/sgid and shared systems that allow users to upload their own configuration files. Users should upgrade to NetHack 3.6.5.

CVE-2020-5254.title: In NetHack before 3.6.6, some out-of-bound values for the hilite_ ...
CVE-2020-5254.summary: In NetHack before 3.6.6, some out-of-bound values for the hilite_status option can be exploited. NetHack 3.6.6 resolves this issue.

CVE-2023-24809.title: NetHack is a single player dungeon exploration game. Starting wit ...
CVE-2023-24809.summary: NetHack is a single player dungeon exploration game. Starting with version 3.6.2 and prior to version 3.6.7, illegal input to the "C" (call) command can cause a buffer overflow and crash the NetHack process. This vulnerability may be a security issue for systems that have NetHack installed suid/sgid and for shared systems. For all systems, it may result in a process crash. This issue is resolved in NetHack 3.6.7. There are no known workarounds.
